parts: Ridan alternifolia, also known as the Ridan tree, has various parts that are used for medicinal purposes. The bark of Ridan alternifolia is often employed to treat fever and other ailments, and is also used to make medicine for skin conditions. The leaves are also used in traditional medicine, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The roots of Ridan alternifolia contain compounds that have been shown to have antimicrobial properties, making them useful in treating infections. The tree's wood is also valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating joint pain and arthritis.
